narrative:
Miami Township D (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,022 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.2 percentage points.
